# PHIL.027 ? Jainism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** jainism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Non-violence (ahimsa); many-sided truth (anekantavada); non-absolutism; karma as material; soul purification; ascetic path

## Application
Practice strict non-violence; recognize multiple valid perspectives; avoid absolute claims; purify through discipline; respect all life

## Key Values
- Non-violence
- Perspectivalism
- Asceticism
- Soul liberation

## Tags
philosophy, eastern-philosophy, jainism
